statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: Microsoft Learn: Optimize Visual Studio performance
links.summary: Microsoft documents Visual Studio performance tuning and solution-loading guidance, but this research pass did not capture a primary registry contract for BackgroundAnalysis.
